name: Deluxe Room
subtitle: Comfort Meets The Mountains
description: Spacious and thoughtfully designed, the Deluxe Room offers warm interiors, natural light, and uninterrupted views of the surrounding hills.

name: Premium Room
subtitle: Panoramic Valley Views
description: Wake up to sweeping views of Gangtok and the Himalayan landscape from a room designed for quiet comfort and relaxation.

name: Family Room
subtitle: Space For Shared Moments
description: Ideal for families and small groups, offering generous space, comfort, and a welcoming atmosphere for memorable stays.
